home.heading: Creative Developer & Designer

about.heading: About me
about.headline: Creative Developer & Designer
about.focus: Bridging the gap between aesthetic UX/UI design and robust technical development.
about.description: I am Arne Defoor, a multidisciplinary creator bridging the gap between logic and aesthetics. With a background in Graphical and Digital Media and Web & Mobile Development, I specialize in building digital products that are as performant as they are beautiful.

education.degree: Master in Graphic Desing & Graphic Storytelling

education.focus: HTML, CSS, Javascript, React, PHP, MySQL

workExperience.focus: Creation of top notch websites for market leaders.
Developing high-end digital campaigns and interactive web experiences.
Managing brand identitie and creating complex layout designs for print and digital.
Designed commercial stationery products for major licensed brands including Smiley and Need for Speed.
Creation of high-end digital assets for communication purposes.

projects.title: Skors
projects.summary: Designed a digital identity for Skros, a tree care company. The new brand system delivers a clear overview of services and streamlines client communication.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Designed a digital identity for Skros, a tree care company. The new brand system delivers a clear overview of services and streamlines client communication.

projects.title: LavaDub
projects.summary: Crafted the visual identity for a Rejoice Soundsystem music event. Serving as an ode to the 90s, the design relies on high contrast, heavy typography, and distilled graphics.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Crafted the visual identity for a Rejoice Soundsystem music event. Serving as an ode to the 90s, the design relies on high contrast, heavy typography, and distilled graphics.

projects.title: Jamrock
projects.summary: Developed an event poster for Jamrock Leuven and Kingstep Soundsystem. Inspired by early dancehall prints, it features a text-heavy, blocked style in a bold duotone palette.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Developed an event poster for Jamrock Leuven and Kingstep Soundsystem. Inspired by early dancehall prints, it features a text-heavy, blocked style in a bold duotone palette.

projects.title: Stand Tall
projects.summary: Designed the artwork for Stand Tall at STUK Leuven, an intimate, soundsystem-driven dance experience. The resulting style is warm and clean, filled with playful graphic elements.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Designed the artwork for Stand Tall at STUK Leuven, an intimate, soundsystem-driven dance experience. The resulting style is warm and clean, filled with playful graphic elements.

projects.title: Digital Illustrations
projects.summary: A selection of digital illustrations and drawings inspired by classic cartoons and comic books. Each piece features vibrant, high-contrast color palettes.

sections.content: A selection of digital illustrations and drawings inspired by classic cartoons and comic books. Each piece features vibrant, high-contrast color palettes.

projects.title: Watercolor
projects.summary: Explorations in watercolor technique on paper. These landscape scenes are directly inspired by real-world locations visited during my travels.

projects.title: Paintings
projects.summary: Acrylic paintings on canvas featuring references to nature and dreamlike scenes. These pieces experiment with color, shape, and shadow to form dynamic compositions.
